q: Which of the following is not a dimensionless quantity?
explanation: [$\mu_r$] = 1 as $\mu_r = \frac{\mu}{\mu_0}$. [Power factor ($\cos \phi$)] = 1. $\mu_0 = \frac{B}{H}$ (unit = $N A^{-2}$): Not dimensionless. [$\mu_0$] = $[MLT^{-2} A^{-2}]$. Quality factor ($Q$) = $\frac{\text{Energy stored}}{\text{Energy dissipated per cycle}}$. So $Q$ is unitless and dimensionless.
